# Documentation review report

_This is the full-depth review format, for docs where the stakes justify it. For
a small or low-stakes doc, a short verdict plus the few issues that matter is
enough — use only the sections below that the doc actually needs, and skip the
rest rather than filling them in._

## Summary

_A short overall assessment of the artifact._

## Intended artifact type

_What kind of doc this is meant to be (public user doc, internal note, design
doc, etc.) and the standard it should meet._

## Blocking issues

_Problems that should be fixed before this doc is used or published._

## Non-blocking suggestions

_Improvements that would help but are not blockers._

## Unsupported or unclear claims

_Statements not backed by evidence, or that are ambiguous._

## Missing user context

_What a reader needs but the doc does not provide._

## Missing edge cases

_States, inputs, or failures the doc does not cover._

## Terminology issues

_Inconsistent, unclear, or incorrect terms._

## Source/evidence gaps

_Places where the doc needs a verifiable source._

## Suggested improvements

_Specific, actionable suggestions._

## Questions for the author

_What only the human author can resolve._
